title: Comprehensive test coverage with 6 integration tests
evidence: handlers_test.go contains TestHealth, TestCreateAndGetBook, TestCreateValidation, TestListWithAuthorFilter, TestUpdateAndDelete, TestGetMissingBook

title: Pure Go SQLite implementation without cgo
